channel.title: Debian on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Debian on Pi Stack

item.title: Aptly vs Reprepro vs Apt-mirror: Self-Hosted Debian Package Repository Management 2026
item.description: Managing Debian and Ubuntu packages across multiple servers requires a reliable, self-hosted package repository. Whether you need to distribute custom-built .deb files, mirror upstream repositories for offline access, or maintain a stable snapshot of package versions for reproducible deployments, a self-hosted apt repository gives you full control over your software supply chain.
